ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "italian_size" INTEGER /* Italian size equivalent */,
  "french_size" INTEGER /* French size equivalent */,
  "spanish_size" INTEGER /* Spanish size equivalent */,
  "german_size" INTEGER /* German size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "usa_size" INTEGER /* USA size equivalent */,
  "japanese_size" INTEGER /* Japanese size equivalent */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name or label of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is applicable */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the clothing item */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a size chart specific to the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item size */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available in this size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name or label of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is applicable */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size is applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size conversion */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_currency FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_language FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_language") REFERENCES languages ("language_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is to be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address where the bill is to be sent */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name or label of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is applicable */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size is applicable */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's website */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, GBP) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, fr) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale code (e.g., en_US, fr_FR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the status */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
